heading: Basic Example
body:
**Input:**

```
{
  "$search": {
    "geoWithin": {
      "path": "address.location",
      "box": {
        "bottomLeft": {
          "type": "Point",
          "coordinates": [112.467, -55.050]
        },
        "topRight": {
          "type": "Point",
          "coordinates": [168.000, -9.133]
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

```
